requirements.task_name: Book the earliest in-person anxiety counseling session after 5 pm within the next 7 days
requirements.task_description: Use the scheduling tool to find an in-person individual counseling appointment for anxiety near ZIP 94103, and book the earliest available time slot at or after 5:00 pm on any date within the next 7 calendar days.
existing_variables: // confirmAppointment() stores confirmed appointment with client_first_name='Jordan', client_last_name='Lee', etc.
// slots contain start_datetime, session_format, location_zip, is_evening, is_weekend, appointment_type_id
// used to verify it is an individual counseling type
// used to verify therapist specialties include anxiety if needed

requirements.task_name: Add two sliding-scale trauma therapists under $80 to the comparison list
requirements.task_description: Find therapists who specialize in trauma, offer sliding-scale pricing, and charge no more than $80 per session, then add the two cheapest matching therapists to the comparison list.
existing_variables: // maintained by toggleTherapistInComparison(); holds the therapist_ids being compared

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getTherapistComparisonDetails() is called (i.e., when the comparison view is opened), regardless of current list contents.
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user actually opened the comparison view. The evaluator will separately use therapist_comparison_lists and therapists to verify that exactly two therapists are selected and that they are the two cheapest matching sliding‑scale trauma therapists under $80.

requirements.task_name: Submit an insurance coverage question using the cheapest plan with a copay of $30 or less
requirements.task_description: Identify the accepted insurance plan with the lowest copay that is $30 or less, then submit a contact form asking specifically about coverage under that plan, mentioning the plan name and copay amount in your message.
existing_variables: // getInsurancePlans() writes nothing but plans already stored here with copay_amount
// submitContactMessage() stores reason, name, email, phone, message, insurance_plan_id, referenced_copay_amount

requirements.task_name: Register for a social anxiety group starting next month in the 6–8 pm time slot
requirements.task_description: Locate a social anxiety group therapy program that begins next calendar month, select an evening session that runs between 6:00 pm and 8:00 pm, and complete the registration form for one participant using the pay-later option.
existing_variables: // contains topic, start_date, format, fee_per_session, etc.
// contains group_program_id, start_date/time, is_evening, weekday info, capacity, registered_count
// submitGroupRegistration() stores participant info, num_participants, payment_option, status

requirements.task_name: Start booking a telehealth therapist with 4.5+ rating and weekend availability for a free 15-minute consult
requirements.task_description: Find a telehealth therapist with a rating of at least 4.5 stars who offers weekend appointments, and begin booking a free 15-minute consultation by selecting the earliest available weekend slot from their schedule.
existing_variables: // contains the free consult type (e.g., name/code indicating 15‑minute consultation, price=0)
// contains session_format, is_weekend, start_datetime, appointment_type_id, therapist_id
// createDraftAppointmentFromSlot() stores status='draft' with therapist_id, appointment_slot_id, appointment_type_id

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to monthly parenting-focused mental health tips
requirements.task_description: Sign up for the practice’s email newsletter with a focus on parenting and family mental health topics, selecting a monthly delivery frequency and providing a sample email address.
existing_variables: // subscribeToNewsletter() stores email, first_name, last_name, frequency, topics, is_active

requirements.task_name: Complete a depression self-assessment and save two recommended articles to a reading list
requirements.task_description: Fill out the depression self-assessment with specified responses, submit it, navigate to the recommended resources, and add exactly two recommended articles to your on-site reading list or saved resources.
existing_variables: // to identify the depression assessment (by code/name)
// to list all questions for the depression assessment
// includes options with order/value to identify the 'middle' option per question
// submitAssessmentSession() stores per-question responses with numeric_value and option IDs
// used to resolve recommended_article_ids to article records
// saveArticleToReadingList() stores article_ids saved by the user

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getSavedReadingList() is called (i.e., when the user opens their reading list / saved resources page).
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user actually opened the reading list page after saving articles. The evaluator will then verify, using assessment_results, articles, and reading_lists, that a depression assessment session was completed, that responses used the middle option for each question, and that at least the first two recommended articles for that assessment result are present in the reading list.

requirements.task_name: Create a safety plan with two local crisis hotline numbers
requirements.task_description: Locate the crisis support information, identify two different local hotline numbers, and use them to fill out and save a safety plan form on the site.
existing_variables: // getCrisisSupportContent()/getCrisisHotlines() expose local/national/specialized hotlines with phone numbers and is_local flag
